experience.title: Healthcare Data Analyst
responsibilities: Utilized SQL for data extraction and manipulation from electronic health record (EHR) systems.
Developed dashboards and visual reports using Tableau, improving data accessibility for non-technical stakeholders.
Conducted statistical analyses to support evidence-based decision-making in clinical settings.
Collaborated with clinical teams to enhance data governance practices and ensure compliance with HIPAA regulations.

experience.title: Data Analyst
responsibilities: Assisted in the integration of healthcare data sources to improve analytical capabilities.
Performed routine data quality assessments to ensure data integrity and accuracy.
Supported various analytics projects focused on operational efficiencies and patient outcomes.

response.summary: Analytical and detail-oriented healthcare data analyst with over 5 years of experience in extracting actionable insights from complex healthcare data. Proficient in SQL and data visualization tools, with a solid foundation in statistical analysis and data governance practices.
